query:
SELECT 
  l.nome,
  l.origem,
  l.status,
  l.origemWebhook,
  DATE_FORMAT(l.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created
FROM leads l
INNER JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%' 
  AND l.origem = 'facebook' 
  AND l.status = 'Aguardando Atendimento'
ORDER BY l.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
